description: Perform a semester rollover for the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course to prepare it for the Fall 2026 semester. Log in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Reset the course to remove all student data, including enrollments, grades, assignment submissions, quiz attempts, and forum posts, and update the course start date to September 1, 2026. Ensure the course content (assignments, quizzes, and forums) remains intact for the new students.
